candidates.notes: Sensitivity Floor falsified at layer 4. 96% of features are Q2 (high abs + high sens), opposite of prediction. U-shape confirmed but structural emptiness prediction failed.

supported_hypotheses: Q3 should dominate if sensitivity is primary
candidates.notes: Layer-specific behavior suggests sensitivity-first may explain layer 8 Q3 dominance. Need to understand why layer 4 shows Q2 dominance.
Common cause hypothesis remains viable but not directly tested. Would need geometric density measurements.

key_finding: Layer 4 features show opposite pattern to layer 8: Q2 dominates (96%) at layer 4 vs Q3 dominates (65%) at layer 8. This layer-specificity contradicts universal Sensitivity Floor prediction.
recommended_next_steps: Recalibrate absorption metric using proper Chanin first-letter protocol
Compare layer 4 vs layer 8 feature properties to understand Q2 vs Q3 dominance
Consider sensitivity-first hypothesis which can accommodate Q3 dominance at layer 8
Investigate whether layer 4 features are genuinely more context-sensitive
